narrative:
15 Ohio House district has 80,557 registered voters, with 60.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.6 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.6% D−R vs +14.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
